turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: Good morning, The Olive Tree restaurant, catering team, Nadia speaking. How can I help?

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: Hi. I'm organising a birthday lunch and I'd like to place a catering order for delivery, please.

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: Of course, I can take that for you now. Could I start with your name?

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: Yes, it's Ben Kowalski.

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: Could you spell the surname for me?

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: Sure, it's K-O-W-A-L-S-K-I. Kowalski.

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: Thank you, Ben. And what date is the party?

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: It's on Saturday the seventh of June. We'd like the food delivered for midday.

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: Saturday the seventh of June, delivery for twelve noon. And how many people are you catering for?

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: There'll be twenty guests — actually, make that twenty-five, a couple more just confirmed.

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: Twenty-five guests, noted. Now, our most popular option for a party is the Sharing Platter menu. That's twelve pounds a head, and it includes a selection of breads, salads, dips and grilled vegetables.

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: That sounds ideal. Can we add some meat dishes as well?

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: Absolutely. We can add the Grilled Chicken skewers at three pounds a head, or the Lamb Kofta at four pounds a head. Both are very popular.

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: Let's add the lamb kofta, please. And can we have a birthday cake too?

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: Of course. A chocolate sponge to serve twenty-five is thirty-five pounds. Would you like any writing on it?

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: Yes please — could it say 'Happy Birthday Grace'? That's G-R-A-C-E.

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: Happy Birthday Grace, lovely. Now, one thing to check — does anyone have allergies I should know about?

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: Yes, two of the guests can't eat nuts, so please make sure everything is nut-free.

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: I'll flag the whole order as nut-free, don't worry. Now, delivery within town is free, and there's a fifty-pound refundable deposit on the serving dishes, which we return when you bring them back. Your order reference is O, then four-eight-two-six, so O4826.

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: O4826. Perfect. And what time will the driver arrive?

turns.speaker: Nadia
turns.text: The driver will aim to arrive at half past eleven, so everything's set out well before your midday start. Could I take a contact number in case there's any hold-up?

turns.speaker: Ben
turns.text: Yes, it's oh-seven-nine-four-one, six-two-two, eight-five-oh. Thanks so much, Nadia.
